Mod.name: Random Transmutation
Mod.description:
[h2] Add 30K+ spells in one : Random Transmutation. [/h2]

When the spell spawn, it randomly selects a material transmutation (e.g. Water into Blood) and keeps it for its entire lifetime. The spell behaves like a standard transmutation modifier.

[i]Known limitation[/i] : because the transmutation input/output are stored in the card entity, the spell won't work if copied (divide/greek letter/ add trigger ...)

If you know a way to get the card ID from the action function reliably, I'm very interested
